description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn with a wooden deck at the front. The facade features large, evenly spaced windows and vertical green trellises with climbing plants, giving it a contemporary and eco-friendly appearance. The front entrance is accessed by a small set of steps leading up to the deck. Adjacent to the bungalow is a driveway with a low retaining wall, where a blue pickup truck and a red sedan are parked. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a clean, minimalist design. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood with a focus on modern aesthetics and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden front deck, and a driveway with parked vehicles. Vertical green trellises and minimalist landscaping enhance its contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden deck, main entrance steps, large windows, and green trellises, with the driveway and parked vehicles visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, retaining wall, and parked vehicles, with the bungalow's flat roof and deck partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall of the bungalow, minimal windows, and the full length of the driveway and vehicles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden deck, steps, and a sloped landscaped area, with the vehicles and driveway in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with vertical green trellises
